generatedSentence: Within their pristine mansion, nestled in perpetual winter, lived a nonbinary goldsmith known as the luckiest leprechaun, whose delicate fingers crafted wonders an inch at a time. The magenta orphrey on their robes was a waymark of forgotten lineage, but a negligible detail to the fluffy silverfish that occasionally visits. A persistent sense of being vulnerable often sparked in their mind, despite being an object of honour among their peers. They barely remembered old instruction from the prince concerning their hidden powers, as they often saw figures loitering at the fence line. Suddenly, a ghastly delegation arrived via airship, their intent to ravage the goldsmith's legacy. This was no imaginary threat; a majority of their land was already a block due to unjust banking schemes and reckless lobbying. The lead lawyer, an imposing figure, carried passports for a forced transportation and offered a bouquet of wilted flowers as a cruel offertory. The goldsmith's muscles tensed with alacrity as they recognized the jackal-like faces of those who sought to lynched their ancestor, now returned to unjustly seize their home. Their hearts felt brimming with a silent, growing rage. The goldsmith, an underdog no longer, began an intense exercise regimen. They ingested a teaspoon of fortified juice and a kilojoule-packed falafel each morning, using injectors to apply special serums that improve muscle viscosity. Their hippocampus was a voxel map of strategic plans, constantly undergoing analysis to promote their counter-offensive. An electronic amplifier hidden behind a wall began jamming the invaders' communications, inhibiting their coordinated efforts. They used a discreet ultrasound device to detect weak points, creating a unified plan to rebuke the entire barrack. The goldsmith's counter-attack was decisive; their diverse allies, including a loyal trooper and a swift wallaby, moved with incredible alacrity down the raceway through the waterway. Each person, a part of a unified acronym taskforce, carried a satchel brimming with jellybean-shaped orb grenades and onion-gas devices, used to deter rather than harm. The decadent invaders, now mourning their defeat, were forced into silent retreat, leaving behind only the scent of urine. The goldsmith had cultivated a bountiful harvest of respect, finally securing their freedom and a decimal point of their ancestral wealth, no longer needing a vibrator for stress relief or a chandler for light, as the future was finally bright.
panelSentences: Within their pristine mansion, nestled in perpetual winter, lived a nonbinary goldsmith known as the luckiest leprechaun, whose delicate fingers crafted wonders an inch at a time. The magenta orphrey on their robes was a waymark of forgotten lineage, but a negligible detail to the fluffy silverfish that occasionally visits. A persistent sense of being vulnerable often sparked in their mind, despite being an object of honour among their peers. They barely remembered old instruction from the prince concerning their hidden powers, as they often saw figures loitering at the fence line.

Suddenly, a ghastly delegation arrived via airship, their intent to ravage the goldsmith's legacy. This was no imaginary threat; a majority of their land was already a block due to unjust banking schemes and reckless lobbying. The lead lawyer, an imposing figure, carried passports for a forced transportation and offered a bouquet of wilted flowers as a cruel offertory. The goldsmith's muscles tensed with alacrity as they recognized the jackal-like faces of those who sought to lynched their ancestor, now returned to unjustly seize their home. Their hearts felt brimming with a silent, growing rage.

The goldsmith, an underdog no longer, began an intense exercise regimen. They ingested a teaspoon of fortified juice and a kilojoule-packed falafel each morning, using injectors to apply special serums that improve muscle viscosity. Their hippocampus was a voxel map of strategic plans, constantly undergoing analysis to promote their counter-offensive. An electronic amplifier hidden behind a wall began jamming the invaders' communications, inhibiting their coordinated efforts. They used a discreet ultrasound device to detect weak points, creating a unified plan to rebuke the entire barrack.

The goldsmith's counter-attack was decisive; their diverse allies, including a loyal trooper and a swift wallaby, moved with incredible alacrity down the raceway through the waterway. Each person, a part of a unified acronym taskforce, carried a satchel brimming with jellybean-shaped orb grenades and onion-gas devices, used to deter rather than harm. The decadent invaders, now mourning their defeat, were forced into silent retreat, leaving behind only the scent of urine. The goldsmith had cultivated a bountiful harvest of respect, finally securing their freedom and a decimal point of their ancestral wealth, no longer needing a vibrator for stress relief or a chandler for light, as the future was finally bright.
rawPanelSentences: Within their **pristine mansion**, nestled in perpetual **winter**, lived a **nonbinary goldsmith** known as the **luckiest leprechaun**, whose delicate **fingers** crafted wonders an **inch** at a time. The **magenta orphrey** on their robes was a **waymark** of forgotten lineage, but a **negligible** detail to the **fluffy silverfish** that occasionally **visits**. A persistent sense of being **vulnerable** often **sparked** in their mind, despite being an object of **honour** among their peers. They barely remembered old **instruction** from the **prince** concerning their hidden powers, as they often saw figures **loitering** at the fence line.

Suddenly, a **ghastly delegation** arrived via **airship**, their intent to **ravage** the goldsmith's legacy. This was no **imaginary** threat; a **majority** of their land was already a **block** due to unjust **banking** schemes and reckless **lobbying**. The lead **lawyer**, an imposing figure, carried **passports** for a forced **transportation** and offered a **bouquet** of wilted **flowers** as a cruel **offertory**. The goldsmith's **muscles** tensed with **alacrity** as they recognized the **jackal**-like faces of those who sought to **lynched** their ancestor, now returned to **unjustly** seize their home. Their hearts felt **brimming** with a silent, growing rage.

The goldsmith, an **underdog** no longer, began an intense **exercise** regimen. They ingested a **teaspoon** of fortified **juice** and a **kilojoule**-packed **falafel** each morning, using **injectors** to **apply** special serums that **improve** muscle **viscosity**. Their **hippocampus** was a **voxel** map of strategic plans, constantly undergoing **analysis** to **promote** their counter-offensive. An **electronic amplifier** hidden behind a **wall** began **jamming** the invaders' communications, inhibiting their coordinated efforts. They used a discreet **ultrasound** device to detect weak points, creating a unified plan to **rebuke** the entire **barrack**.

The goldsmith's counter-attack was decisive; their **diverse** allies, including a loyal **trooper** and a swift **wallaby**, moved with incredible **alacrity** down the **raceway** through the **waterway**. Each person, a part of a **unified** **acronym** taskforce, carried a **satchel** **brimming** with **jellybean**-shaped **orb** grenades and **onion**-gas devices, used to deter rather than harm. The decadent invaders, now **mourning** their defeat, were forced into **silent** retreat, leaving behind only the scent of **urine**. The goldsmith had cultivated a bountiful **harvest** of **respect**, finally securing their freedom and a decimal point of their ancestral wealth, no longer needing a vibrator for stress relief or a chandler for light, as the future was finally bright.
imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, vibrant neon futurism, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting, thick white gutters, clean black borders. PROTAGONIST: A nonbinary leprechaun goldsmith with metallic green skin and intricate gold circuitry patterns on their face, wearing a magenta orphrey robe. TOP-LEFT PANEL: Nonbinary leprechaun goldsmith meticulously crafting a glowing orb with delicate, multi-jointed fingers, surrounded by ancient, glowing tools and pristine, futuristic workshop details. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: A ghastly, stylized airship with menacing spotlights hovering over the goldsmith's mansion, while a group of shadowy, sharp-suited figures (lawyers) disembark, carrying ominous documents. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: The nonbinary leprechaun goldsmith, muscles visibly toned and focused, performing advanced combat exercises in a high-tech training room with glowing projections, injecting a glowing serum into their arm. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: The goldsmith and a diverse team of allies (including a wallaby and a futuristic trooper) charging down a neon-lit waterway on sleek hover-skis, while the defeated invaders retreat in disarray in the background.

definitions.definition: (Irish folklore) One of a race of elves that can reveal hidden treasure to those who catch them.
A slender jointed extremity of the human hand, exclusive of the thumb.
definitions.example: Humans have two hands and ten fingers. Each hand has one thumb and four fingers.

definitions.definition: Similar or similar-looking extremities in other animals, particularly:
Something similar in shape to the human finger, particularly:
Something similarly extending, from a larger body, particularly:
definitions.example: a finger of land; a finger of smoke

definitions.definition: Something similar in function or agency to the human finger, with regard to touching, grasping, or pointing.
Various units of measure based or notionally based on the adult human finger, particularly
A part of a glove intended to cover a finger.
Skill in the use of the fingers, as in playing upon a musical instrument.
Someone skilled in the use of their fingers, a pickpocket.
A person.
(especially in the phrase 'give someone the finger') An obscene or insulting gesture made by raising one's middle finger towards someone with the palm of one's hand facing inwards.
To identify or point out. Also put the finger on. To report to or identify for the authorities, rat on, rat out, squeal on, tattle on, turn in.
To poke, probe, feel, or fondle with a finger or fingers.
To use the fingers to penetrate and sexually stimulate one's own or another person's vagina or anus; to fingerbang
To use specified finger positions in producing notes on a musical instrument.
To provide instructions in written music as to which fingers are to be used to produce particular notes or passages.
To query (a user's status) using the Finger protocol.
To steal; to purloin.
To execute, as any delicate work.
Someone or something that has a fluffy texture.
A person who is superficial, who lacks depth or seriousness.
A babycino (frothy milk drink).
Covered with fluff.
Light; soft; airy.
Warm and comforting.
Not clearly defined or explained; fuzzy.
Lightweight; superficial; lacking depth or seriousness.
A Middle Eastern food in the form of balls made from chickpeas and other ingredients. Often served in a pita.
definitions.example: There's a stall at the market that sells fantastic falafel.

definitions.definition: A pita with falafel balls inside (like a sandwich or a wrap).
A single falafel ball.
definitions.example: The stallholder puts salad into an open pita bread, followed by the four falafels, and then liberally covers them with hummus.

definitions.definition: A person who makes, repairs or sells things out of gold, especially jewelry.
A banker (because the goldsmiths of London used to receive money on deposit, being equipped to keep it safely).
A vibrant light purple, purplish-red, reddish-purple, or pinkish purple colour obtained by mixing red and blue light (thus a secondary colour), but primary in the CMYK colour system used in printing.
Having the colour of fuchsia, fuchsine, light purple.
A unit of length equal to one twelfth of a foot, or exactly 2.54 centimetres.
The amount of water which would cover a surface to the depth of an inch, used as a measurement of rainfall.
The amount of an alcoholic beverage which would fill a glass or bottle to the depth of an inch.
A very short distance.
definitions.example: "Don't move an inch!"

definitions.definition: (followed by a preposition) To advance very slowly, or by a small amount (in a particular direction).
definitions.example: Fearful of falling, he inched along the window ledge.

definitions.definition: To drive by inches, or small degrees.
To deal out by inches; to give sparingly.
Any activity designed to develop or hone a skill or ability.
definitions.example: The teacher told us that the next exercise is to write an essay.

definitions.definition: Activity intended to improve physical, or sometimes mental, strength and fitness.
definitions.example: I do crosswords for mental exercise.

definitions.definition: A setting in action or practicing; employment in the proper mode of activity; exertion; application; use.
definitions.example: The law guarantees us the free exercise of our rights.

definitions.definition: The performance of an office, ceremony, or duty.
definitions.example: I assisted the ailing vicar in the exercise of his parish duties.

definitions.definition: That which gives practice; a trial; a test.
To exert for the sake of training or improvement; to practice in order to develop.
definitions.example: to exercise troops or horses;  to exercise one's brain with a puzzle

definitions.definition: To perform physical activity for health or training.
definitions.example: I exercise at the gym every day.

definitions.definition: To use (a right, an option, etc.); to put into practice.
definitions.example: She is going to exercise her right to vote.

definitions.definition: (now often in passive) To occupy the attention and effort of; to task; to tax, especially in a painful or vexatious manner; harass; to vex; to worry or make anxious.
definitions.example: exercised with pain

definitions.definition: To set in action; to cause to act, move, or make exertion; to give employment to.
A small spoon used to stir the contents of a cup or glass.
A unit of measure, equivalent to one-third of a tablespoon or roughly five milliliters.
Certain insects
Certain fish
To trigger, kindle into activity (an argument, etc).
To light; to kindle.
To give off a spark or sparks.
Appalachian To court.
To woo, court; to act the gallant or beau.
That has had sparks (of electricity) passed through it
A venomous snake in the family Viperidae.
A dangerous, treacherous, or malignant person.
A person who smokes marijuana.
Able to be neglected, ignored or excluded from consideration; too small or unimportant to be of concern.
definitions.example: We found errors, but their effects were negligible.

definitions.definition: Traditionally the fourth of the four seasons, typically regarded as being from December 23 to March 20 in continental regions of the Northern Hemisphere or the months of June, July and August in the Southern Hemisphere. It is the time when the sun is lowest in the sky, resulting in short days, and the time of year with the lowest atmospheric temperatures for the region.
The period of decay, old age, death, or the like.
Someone with dark skin, eyes and hair, seen as best suited to certain colors of clothing.
An appliance to be fixed on the front of a grate, to keep a kettle warm, etc.
To spend the winter (in a particular place).
definitions.example: When they retired, they hoped to winter in Florida.

definitions.definition: To store something (for instance animals) somewhere over winter to protect it from cold.
To stand about without any aim or purpose; to stand about idly.
definitions.example: For some reason, they discourage loitering outside the store, but encourage it inside.

definitions.definition: To remain at a certain place instead of moving on.
For an aircraft to remain in the air near a target.
The action of the verb loiter.
definitions.example: a book about my loiterings in Europe

definitions.definition: To execute (somebody) without a proper legal trial or procedure, especially by hanging and backed by a mob.
To raise (someone) to a more important, responsible, or remunerative job or rank.
definitions.example: He promoted his clerk to office manager.

definitions.definition: To advocate or urge on behalf of (something or someone); to attempt to popularize or sell by means of advertising or publicity.
definitions.example: They promoted the abolition of daylight saving time.

definitions.definition: To encourage, urge or incite.
(usually in passive form) To elevate to a higher league.
definitions.example: At the end of the season, three teams are promoted to the Premier League.

definitions.definition: To increase the activity of (a catalyst) by changing its surface structure.
To exchange (a pawn) for a queen or other piece when it reaches the eighth rank.
definitions.example: Having crossed the chessboard, his pawn was promoted to a queen.

definitions.definition: To move on to a subsequent stage of education.
definitions.example: At the end of Primary 6 students can promote directly to the secondary section of SIS.

definitions.definition: An act of delegating.
A group of delegates used to discuss issues with an opponent.
A method-dispatching technique describing the lookup and inheritance rules for self-referential calls.
A contract whereby the original debtor substitutes a new debtor in his stead, with the creditor’s permission.
Recognition of importance or value; respect; veneration (of someone, usually for being morally upright or successful)
definitions.example: The crowds gave the returning general much honor and praise.

definitions.definition: The state of being morally upright, honest, noble, virtuous, and magnanimous; excellence of character; the perception of such a state; favourable reputation; dignity
definitions.example: He was a most perfect knight, for he had great honor and chivalry.

definitions.definition: A token of praise or respect; something that represents praiseworthiness or respect, such as a prize or award given by the state to a citizen
definitions.example: Audie Murphy received many honors, such as the Distinguished Service Cross.

definitions.definition: A privilege
definitions.example: I had the honour of dining with the ambassador.

definitions.definition: (in the plural) the privilege of going first
definitions.example: I'll let you have the honours, Bob—go ahead.

definitions.definition: A cause of respect and fame; a glory; an excellency; an ornament.
definitions.example: He is an honour to his nation.

definitions.definition: (feudal law) a seigniory or lordship held of the king, on which other lordships and manors depended
The center point of the upper half of an armorial escutcheon (compare honour point)
In bridge, an ace, king, queen, jack, or ten especially of the trump suit. In some other games, an ace, king, queen or jack.
(in the plural) (courses for) an honours degree: a university qualification of the highest rank
definitions.example: At university I took honours in modern history.

definitions.definition: To think of highly, to respect highly; to show respect for; to recognise the importance or spiritual value of
definitions.example: The freedom fighters will be forever remembered and honored by the people.

definitions.definition: To conform to, abide by, act in accordance with (an agreement, treaty, promise, request, or the like)
definitions.example: I trusted you, but you have not honored your promise.

definitions.definition: To confer (bestow) an honour or privilege upon (someone)
definitions.example: Ten members of the profession were honored at the ceremony.

definitions.definition: To make payment in respect of (a cheque, banker's draft, etc.)
definitions.example: I'm sorry Sir, but the bank did not honour your cheque.

definitions.definition: A monocotyledonous plant (Allium cepa), allied to garlic, used as vegetable and spice.
The bulb of such a plant.
The genus as a whole.
A ball.
A person from Bermuda or of Bermudian descent.
Any elaborate embroidery, especially when made of gold thread; an object (such as clothing or fabric) adorned with such embroidery.
An embroidered ornamental band or border on an ecclesiastical vestment, altar frontal, etc.
To express sadness or sorrow for; to grieve over (especially a death).

To wear mourning.
The act of expressing or feeling sorrow or regret; lamentation.

The traditional clothes worn by those who mourn (in Western societies, typically coloured black).

The act of instructing, teaching, or furnishing with information or knowledge.

An order or command.
A single operation of a processor defined by an instruction set architecture.
A set of directions provided by a manufacturer for the users of a product or service.
More or most likely to be exposed to the chance of being attacked or harmed, either physically or emotionally.
definitions.example: It's okay to get vulnerable every now and again.

definitions.definition: More likely to be exposed to malicious programs or viruses.
definitions.example: a vulnerable PC with no antivirus software

definitions.definition: Liquid waste consisting of water, salts and urea, which is made in the kidneys, stored in the bladder, then released through the urethra.
To urinate.
(of people) Favoured by luck; fortunate; having good success or good fortune

definitions.definition: Producing, or resulting in, good fortune

definitions.definition: Unspoiled; still with its original purity; uncorrupted or unsullied.
Primitive, pertaining to the earliest state of something.
Perfect.
A single act of visiting.
A meeting with a doctor at their surgery or the doctor's at one's home.
To habitually go to (someone in distress, sickness etc.) to comfort them. (Now generally merged into later senses, below.)
To go and meet (a person) as an act of friendliness or sociability.
Of God: to appear to (someone) to comfort, bless, or chastise or punish them. (Now generally merged into later senses, below.)
To punish, to inflict harm upon (someone or something).
Of a sickness, misfortune etc.: to afflict (someone).
To inflict punishment, vengeance for (an offense) on or upon someone.
To go to (a shrine, temple etc.) for worship. (Now generally merged into later senses, below.)
To go to (a place) for pleasure, on an errand, etc.

The three-dimensional analogue of a pixel; a volume element representing some numerical quantity, such as the colour, of a point in three-dimensional space, used in the visualisation and analysis of three-dimensional (especially scientific and medical) data
A sign or symbol marked in a prominent position in an off-road location to show the track of a footpath or route; fingerpost; guidepost; milestone.
A map coordinate stored within a satellite navigation system
A (male) ruler, a sovereign; a king, monarch.
A female monarch.
Someone who is preeminent in their field; a great person.

definitions.definition: The (male) ruler or head of a principality.
A male member of a royal family other than the ruler; especially (in the United Kingdom) the son or grandson of the monarch.
A non-royal high title of nobility, especially in France and the Holy Roman Empire.
definitions.example: Prince Louis de Broglie won the 1929 Nobel Prize in Physics.

definitions.definition: The mushroom Agaricus augustus.
A type of court card used in tarot cards, the equivalent of the jack.
Any of various nymphalid butterflies of the genus Rohana.
Like a ghost in appearance; death-like; pale; pallid; dismal.
Horrifyingly shocking.
Extremely bad.

definitions.definition: In a ghastly manner.
The smallest particle of a specific element or compound that retains the chemical properties of that element or compound; two or more atoms held together by chemical bonds.
definitions.example: Hydrogen chloride is a diatomic molecule, consisting of a hydrogen atom and a chlorine atom.

definitions.definition: A tiny amount.
A part or division of the intestines, usually the large intestine.
(in the plural) The entrails or intestines; the internal organs of the stomach.
(in the plural) The (deep) interior of something.
definitions.example: The treasures were stored in the bowels of the ship.

definitions.definition: (in the plural) The seat of pity or the gentler emotions; pity or mercy.
(in plural) offspring
To disembowel.
To make (something) better; to increase the value or productivity (of something).

Sound with a frequency greater than the upper limit of human hearing, which is approximately 20 kilohertz.
The use of ultrasonic waves for diagnostic or therapeutic purposes.
To treat with ultrasound.
Anything that amplifies, or makes something larger or more intense.
An adverb that adds intensity, such as "really" or "totally".

A portable encasement that houses a large speaker, used to amplify voices and musical instruments at live performances.
A lens that enlarges the field of vision.
To lay or place; to put (one thing to another)

definitions.definition: To put to use; to use or employ for a particular purpose, or in a particular case
definitions.example: to apply funds to the repayment of a debt

definitions.definition: To make use of, declare, or pronounce, as suitable, fitting, or relative
definitions.example: We need to apply the skills we've learned to solve this problem

definitions.definition: To put closely; to join; to engage and employ diligently, or with attention
To to address; to refer; generally used reflexively.
To submit oneself as a candidate (with the adposition "to" designating the recipient of the submission, and the adposition "for" designating the position).
definitions.example: I recently applied to the tavern for a job as a bartender.

definitions.definition: To pertain or be relevant to a specified individual or group.
definitions.example: That rule only applies to foreigners.

definitions.definition: To busy; to keep at work; to ply.
To visit.
The third season of the year; autumn; fall.

definitions.definition: The season of gathering ripened crops; specifically, the time of reaping and gathering grain.
The process of gathering the ripened crop; harvesting.
The yield of harvesting, i.e., the gathered crops or fruits.

definitions.definition: To win, achieve a gain.

definitions.definition: (degree) By a small margin.
(degree) Almost not at all.
definitions.example: The plane is so far away now I can barely see it.

definitions.definition: Merely.
To deal with a bank or financial institution, or for an institution to provide financial services to a client.
definitions.example: He banked with Barclays.

definitions.definition: To put into a bank.
definitions.example: I'm going to bank the money.

definitions.definition: To conceal in the rectum for use in prison.

To cause (an aircraft) to bank.
To form into a bank or heap, to bank up.

Not binary.

A dealer in (a specific kind of) provisions or supplies; especially a ship chandler.
To connect two or more things.
(of a Web page) To contain a hyperlink to another page.

definitions.definition: To supply (somebody) with a hyperlink; to direct by means of a link.
definitions.example: Haven't you seen his Web site? I'll link you to it.

definitions.definition: To post a hyperlink to.
definitions.example: Stop linking those unfunny comics all the time!

definitions.definition: To demonstrate a correlation between two things.
To combine objects generated by a compiler into a single executable.
To skip or trip along smartly; to go quickly.
Linkage
Serving to connect other things together.

An automorphism of affine space.

The decimal system itself.
A decimal place.

To represent with numbers after a decimal point
Concerning numbers expressed in decimal or mathematical calculations performed using decimal.
A large house or building, usually built for the wealthy.
A luxurious flat (apartment).
A house provided for a clergyman; a manse.
A stopping-place during a journey; a stage.
An astrological house; a station of the moon.
One of twenty-eight sections of the sky.

A liquid from a plant, especially fruit.

Without unwillingness or hesitation; showing readiness.

definitions.definition: Without impediment, easily.

definitions.definition: One who keeps something.

definitions.definition: A person or thing worth keeping.

Cause to become one; make into a unit; consolidate; merge; combine.
Become one.

To form into an acronym.
More than half (50%) of some group.

definitions.definition: The difference between the winning vote and the rest of the votes.

definitions.definition: Legal adulthood.

definitions.definition: An action to interfere with the movement of an opposing player or of the object of play (ball, puck).

definitions.definition: To shape or sketch out roughly.
